title: Modern Juice Ad Poster

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create a premium vertical 3:4 modern juice advertisement poster. Set the scene in a bright urban indoor corridor with colorful graffiti wall art on one side, clean minimal architecture on the other, glossy floor reflections, and a trendy streetwear lifestyle mood.

Feature a stylish young adult female model crouching confidently in the midground. She wears a red oversized jacket, white top, black joggers, and white sneakers, looking directly into the camera with a cool confident expression.

In the foreground, show a giant realistic fruit juice bottle held close to the camera in forced perspective. The bottle dominates the composition, stays sharply focused, and has glossy reflections plus fresh condensation. Use a fictional brand name such as VIVAJUICE in bold modern typography. The label should include attractive fruit illustrations and flavor text such as Sunrise Mango or Tropical Burst.

Place the brand logo and tagline Drink Fresh. Live Bold. at the top left. Across the upper center, add huge bold overlapping typography reading FRESH EVERY SIP or PURE AS NATURE, using high-contrast dark green and mint colors. Beneath the headline, add four clean icon-based feature badges in one row: NO ADDED SUGAR, 100% NATURAL, NO PRESERVATIVES, and NOT FROM CONCENTRATE.

At the bottom right, arrange three smaller bottle variants in different flavors. Use soft natural lighting mixed with polished commercial studio lighting, realistic shadows, shallow depth of field, crisp ad typography, and a premium energetic eCommerce campaign aesthetic inspired by modern Instagram product ads and billboard campaigns.
